popularStory.headline: STEPHEN JORDAN + WIVES (1) UNIDENTIFIED & (2) SUSANNAH (?), "THE GREAT MIGRATION....""
popularStory.description:
BIOGRAPHICAL SKETCH FROM OUTSTANDING HISTORICAL SERIES, "THE GREAT MIGRATION....," BY ROBERT CHARLES ANDERSON
    
     STEPHEN JORDAN

ORIGIN: Unknown.

MIGRATION: 1634 on the Mary & John (on 24 Marc …

deathPlace.address: Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America

burialPlace.address: Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Stephen Jordan is estimated to have been born in about 1590 in England. Robert Charles Anderson in his Great Migration biography of Stephen states that his specific origins are unknown.

Stephen Jurden "took the Oathes of Supremacy, & Alleigeance to pass for New England in the Mary & John of London Robert Sayres master.": 24 Mar 1633. He, subsequently, immigrated to New England in 1634 on the Mary and John and settled initially in Ipswich (Essex County), Massachusetts.

Only adult men were required to take the oaths of supremacy and allegiance, but it can be assumed that his wife and children also immigrated with him in 1634. His first wife, whose name is unknown, died before 1660. In about 1660 he married widow Susanna Merrill, whose last name at birth is not known. Around the time of his second marriage, he moved to Newbury (Essex County), Massachusetts.

Stephen Jordon and others were freed from ordinary training, on account of age, 26 March 1650.

Stephen had a house and land in Ipswich, which he sold, and after his second marriage he had a house in Newbury.

Stephen died 8 February 1669/70 in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts.

Will of Steven Jordan of Newbury, dated Apr. 5, 1667; and allowed in court, it being ordered that the estate be left in the hands of the widow for her comfortable subsistence during her life: to daughter Crose of Ipswich, 15li.; To daughter Andrews Ipswich, 15li.; to his wife, his house and land in Newbury during her life, and at her death to Steeven, son of Robert Crose, of Ipswich, his son-in-law; to wife, half of his household goods; and to his two sons Robert Crose and John Andrews, the other half; Steven Crose To give to "his kinswoman and my grand-child, Elizabeth Andrews," 5li. Wit: Susana Wheeler and Mary Poore.

Inventory of the estate of Steven Jordan, who deceased, February 8, 1669 taken by John Merrill, Wm. Pillsberry, Wm. Sawyer and Anthony Somerby: house and land, 14 li., domestic animals, wearing apparel, household furnishings and utensils, the great Bible, etc., 39li. 4s.6d. Debts he owed to Abell Merill, for work haying besides attendance on him both night and day for three years, to Daniel Merrill, to Nathaniel Merrill, for coffin and the funeral, 1li., to John night; total, 9li.19s.6d.

«b»Children by first unknown wife.«/b»
1.) Ann Jordan b. say 1615 m. 20 August 1635, Robert Cross

2.) Jane Jordan b. say 1626 m. about 1646 John Andrews.

There was no son Stephen in the Massachusetts records.

Anderson's Great Migration specifically state there is no known relationship between Francis Jordan of Ipswich and Stephen. Francis was never mentioned in the probate documents of Stephen.

sourceList.title: ***Stephen Jordan, Biographical & Family Data (including inability to identify verifiably his English origin or his first marriage) in outstanding historical series, "The Great Migration: Immigration to New England, 1634 - 1635"
Stephen Jordan, "Massachusetts, Town Clerk, Vital and Town Records, 1626-2001"

zh.lifeSummary: Stephen Jordan於大約1590年出生在英國英格蘭。他於大約1612年與Mrs Steven Jordan在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他於1634年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼易普斯維其並於1634年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼易普斯維其。他去世於1669年2月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利享年80歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Stephen Jordan于大约1590年出生在英国英格兰。他于大约1612年与Mrs Steven Jordan在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他于1634年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼易普斯維其并于1634年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼易普斯維其。他去世于1669年2月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利享年80岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。

nameMeanings.name: Jordan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, French (mainly Alsace and Haute-Savoie), Polish, Czech, and Slovenian; Spanish and Hungarian (Jordán): from the Christian personal name or nickname Jordan. This is taken from the name of the river Jordan (Hebrew Yarden, a derivative of yarad ‘to go down’, i.e. to the Dead Sea). At the time of the Crusades it was a common practice for crusaders and pilgrims to bring back flasks of water from the river in which John the Baptist had baptized people, including Christ himself, and to use it in the christening of their own children. As a result Jordan became quite a common personal name.

variants.name: Giordano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Rocco, Antonio, Pasquale, Carmine, Vito, Domenic, Gaetano, Giuseppe, Sal, Santo.
Italian: from the personal name Giordano, an equivalent of Jordan .

variants.name: Jourdan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Dominique, Gabrielle, Henri, Lucien, Pierre, Raoul, Yves.
English: variant of   Jordan  .
French (mainly southern): variant of   Jourdain  , a cognate of 2 below.

variants.name: Jourdain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Henri, Pierre, Fritz, Hans, Jacques, Rommel.
French, Breton (mainly Finistère), and West Indian (mainly Haiti, also Martinique and Dominican Republic): from the French personal name Jourdain, an equivalent of Jordan .
English (London, Derbyshire): French-influenced variant of   Jordan  ; compare 1 above.

variants.name: Jordison
meanings: English (North Yorkshire, Durham, and Northumberland): from a Middle English pet form, Jordi, of the male personal name Jordan + -son, or directly from a phonetic shortening of Jordanson.

variants.name: Jorden
meanings: English: variant of   Jordan  .
North German (mainly Jörden): probably a variant of Jordan . Compare Yerden and Yerdon .

variants.name: Judd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Judde, Jutte, a pet form of Jordan .
German: variant of   Jude  .

variants.name: Jorda
meanings: Catalan (Jordà): from the personal name Jordà (see Jordan ).

variants.name: Jerden
meanings: English: from a variant of the personal name Jurdon, an old form of Jordan .

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

variants.name: Jordon
meanings: English: variant of   Jordan  .

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Stephen Jordan was born about 1590, in England, United Kingdom. He married Mrs Steven Jordan about 1612, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He immigrated to Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1634 and lived in Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1634. He died on 8 February 1669, in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 80, and was buried in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Stephen Jordan est né environ 1590, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Mrs Steven Jordan environ 1612, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il a immigré au Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1634 et a vécu à Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1634. Il est décédé le 8 février 1669, à Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

it.lifeSummary: Stephen Jordan è nato il circa 1590 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Mrs Steven Jordan circa 1612, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Immigrato nel Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1634 e vissuto a Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1634. Morì il 8 febbraio 1669, nel Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Stephen Jordanは約1590年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。約1612年にイギリススフォルクでMrs Steven Jordanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1634年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーイプスウィチに移住し，1634年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーイプスウィチに住んでいた。彼は1669年2月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスニューブリーで80歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーにて埋葬された。

ko.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.lifeSummary: Stephen Jordan(은)는 대략 1590년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1612년 영국 수폴크에서 Mrs Steven Jordan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1634년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 이프스위치로 이민을 떠났고, 1634년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 이프스위치에서 살았다. 그는 1669년 2월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Stephen Jordan nasceu aproximadamente 1590, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Mrs Steven Jordan aproximadamente 1612, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1634 e viveu em Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1634. Ele faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1669, em Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Stephen Jordan родился около 1590 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Steven Jordan около 1612 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он иммигрировал в ипсвич, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1634 году, а также жил в местности ипсвич, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1634 году. Он умер 8 февраля 1669 г. в местности нюбури, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Stephen Jordan nació aproximadamente 1590, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Mrs Steven Jordan aproximadamente 1612, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Inmigró a Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1634 y vivió en Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1634. Murió el 8 de febrero de 1669, en Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
